card.title: Database Table Sync
card.description: Connect to a database, select tables to sync, and write data to Bitable. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
table.empty: No syncable tables found in this database
sync.modeFullDesc: Clear target table and rewrite all data
sync.modeIncrementalDesc: Append only new rows with primary key greater than last sync
sync.incrementalTitle: Select Primary Key for Each Table
progress.label: Syncing to Bitable
scheduled.title: Server-side Scheduled Jobs
scheduled.description: Create scheduled jobs to automatically sync database to Bitable, even when the plugin is closed. App Token is auto-fetched; just enter the access token.
scheduled.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your token from Feishu Open Platform
hint.text: Tip: Manual sync writes via the in-plugin JS SDK; scheduled sync writes via server-side Feishu Open API + access token, running automatically even when the plugin is closed.
msg.connectSuccess: Connected successfully. {count} tables found. Select tables and start syncing.
msg.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one table to sync
msg.incrementalNoPk: In incremental mode, please select a primary key for at least one table
msg.quotaExhausted: Free quota exhausted (3 syncs). Please upgrade to continue.
msg.quotaExhaustedNewTab: Free quota exhausted (3 syncs). Payment page opened in a new tab.
msg.quotaExhaustedClick: Free quota exhausted (3 syncs). Please click to pay.
msg.quotaInsufficient: Sync quota insufficient. Please click to pay.
msg.quotaInsufficientNewTab: Sync quota insufficient. Payment page opened in a new tab.
msg.paymentFailed: Unable to open payment page. Please try again later.
msg.openPaymentLink: Please click the link to complete payment: Open Payment Page
msg.userIdError: Unable to get user info. Please open this plugin inside Feishu Bitable.
alipay.title: Alipay Scan to Pay
alipay.scanToPay: Scan the QR code with Alipay to pay
alipay.footerNote: Effective immediately after payment, valid for one year
alipay.timeout: Payment timed out. Please close and try again.
renewal.expiringSoon: Your plan expires in {days} days ({date}). Please renew.
renewal.expired: Your plan expired on {date}. Please renew to continue.
validate.noTablesSelected: Please connect to database and select tables first
validate.bitableAppToken: Unable to get Bitable App Token. Please use this plugin inside Feishu Bitable.
